name: Sad Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the light brown sugar with the eggs until well combined.
2. Stir in the vegetable oil, then gradually add the biscuit mix until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Add the vanilla extract, chopped pecans, and flaked coconut to the mixture.
4. Pour the batter into an ungreased 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
NOTE: Do not be alarmed if the cake looks strange. It is called "Sad Cake" because it rises fairly high before collapsing in the middle. Despite its appearance, it is delicious and can be served warm with whipped cream or ice cream.
